name: HILux Golf Studio
about: HILux Golf Studio is a golf simulation venue offering a high-tech environment for golfers of all skill levels. The studio is equipped with advanced simulation technology, providing an immersive indoor golfing experience. Pricing details are not explicitly listed on the website, suggesting a tailored or inquiry-based model. The venue is best suited for individual practice, small groups, and those seeking a professional golfing atmosphere without the constraints of weather or course availability.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulation technology for realistic play
Privacy and comfort in individual bays
Ideal for year-round practice regardless of weather
Suitable for both casual and competitive play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though bringing your own clubs is recommended for consistency.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and group size, but typically ranges from 1.5-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly amenities or policies is provided.
